scores.publication: Shrine N et al. Nature Genetics (2019)
scores.license: PGS Catalog terms of use; cite the source publication
limitations: The Catalog reports the weight type as not reported, so score direction is not converted into a higher/lower lung-function claim.
No compatible individual reference distribution is bundled; no percentile is returned.
A variant-only VCF cannot prove callability at omitted loci. Reference-genotype inference must be explicitly disclosed.
Spirometry, symptoms, smoking, respiratory disease, body size, age, sex, altitude, and test technique remain decisive.
